test.create_query: CREATE TABLE perf_cache_bl ( region String, product String, store_id UInt32, quantity UInt64, price Float64, ts DateTime ) ENGINE = MergeTree ORDER BY (region, store_id, ts)
test.fill_query: INSERT INTO perf_cache_bl SELECT arrayElement(['Europe', 'Asia', 'America', 'Africa', 'Oceania'], (number % 5) + 1), arrayElement(['Laptop', 'Phone', 'Tablet', 'Watch', 'Camera', 'Speaker', 'Monitor', 'Keyboard'], (number % 8) + 1), number % 200, (number % 1000) + 1, round(10 + (number % 500) * 0.1, 2), toDateTime('2024-01-01') + number FROM numbers(10000000)

SELECT region, product, store_id, sum(quantity), avg(price), uniqExact(ts) FROM perf_cache_bl WHERE region IN ('Europe', 'Asia', 'America') GROUP BY region, product, store_id ORDER BY sum(quantity) DESC LIMIT 5 FORMAT Null SETTINGS use_query_cache = 1, query_cache_before_limit_and_order_by = 1
test.query: SELECT region, product, store_id, sum(quantity), avg(price), uniqExact(ts) FROM perf_cache_bl WHERE region IN ('Europe', 'Asia', 'America') GROUP BY region, product, store_id ORDER BY sum(quantity) DESC LIMIT 5 FORMAT Null

SELECT region, product, store_id, sum(quantity), avg(price), uniqExact(ts) FROM perf_cache_bl WHERE region IN ('Europe', 'Asia', 'America') GROUP BY region, product, store_id ORDER BY sum(quantity) DESC LIMIT 5 FORMAT Null SETTINGS use_query_cache = 1, query_cache_before_limit_and_order_by = 1

SELECT region, product, store_id, sum(quantity), avg(price), uniqExact(ts) FROM perf_cache_bl WHERE region IN ('Europe', 'Asia', 'America') GROUP BY region, product, store_id ORDER BY sum(quantity) DESC LIMIT 20 FORMAT Null SETTINGS use_query_cache = 1, query_cache_before_limit_and_order_by = 1

SELECT region, product, store_id, sum(quantity), avg(price), uniqExact(ts) FROM perf_cache_bl WHERE region IN ('Europe', 'Asia', 'America') GROUP BY region, product, store_id ORDER BY sum(quantity) ASC LIMIT 5 FORMAT Null SETTINGS use_query_cache = 1, query_cache_before_limit_and_order_by = 1
